info.title: Hypar CLI
info.description: The command line interface for Hypar.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: InvocationExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: InvocationExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: InvocationExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: InvocationExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: InvocationExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String, IReadOnlyCollection`1, Argument, Boolean, ICommandHandler, Boolean))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Tools for creating and managing functions on https://hypar.io

commands.name: generate-types
commands.description: Generate user element types from the specified url.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generate the code for a new converter.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Generate input, output, and function classes from a hypar.json.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the hypar function found in the current directory. Defaults to running the function whenever the function's code or its input change, but can also run across a provided list of input values instead.

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pull changes made to your function via the Hypar web UI down to your local hypar.json.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Open a browser window to edit your function configuration.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update the current function to the latest version of Hypar, or to a specified version.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Tools for dealing with tests for Hypar functions.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a test for the current function based on the data in a workflow.
